offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating compliance reports from raw shipment logs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges

try_it: Let users try importing shipment logs and generating reports on 1-3 items

Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
